entry.title: Re: Report on SAP Signavio Process Governance data using the Analytics API and Microsoft Power BI
entry.content:
Hi Manuel, 

In my case the records are getting restricted to 100. Is it something you are facing as well ? or do you suggest any workaround for it?

entry.title: Re: Object type PROG (SE38) not supported in SAP ABAP Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi Vincent801,

 

what are you trying to achieve? You want to implement a function module in ABAP Cloud? If yes I would refrain from that, function modules just like programs are from pre-ABAP OO time. We do not use them in current development as they are outdated. I would rewrite and implement the coding in a new method so instead of function zfm_operator, you create a method in your class called METHOD operator. If you want to call a remote function module you find a blog post here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/call-a-remote-function-module-rfc-from-sap-cloud-platform-abap-environment/ba-p/13458760

 

Best, Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Change value of fields of an internal table without loop
entry.content: You say "I should do the same but without loop." It means you probably want to use what newbies call incorrectly "new ABAP", which is without "LOOP AT" (but in fact it remains a loop with only a different syntax), its real name is a Constructor Expression. Newbies incorrectly think that it has a better performance, that's completely wrong. I hope you understand now.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow in SAP S/4HANA Sales Price
entry.content: Is it possible to add more pre conditions to the workflow?

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @mahesh_varma 

the authorization token has a validity of only 90 days. It's very inconvenient to have to ask the accounting people (who have the ANAF certificate for authentication) to use Postman and get a new token every 3 months. 

Are there any updates on automatic renewal? I think the topic is quite urgent, since it's a missing block of the whole integration. 

Thank you

entry.title: Are there any use case for migrating HCM module from ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA (on-premise)?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently I'm just searching the realistic approach for now..

But I don't have any experience and knowledges about both module HCM and Migration.

 

The target system; SAP S/4HANA 2023 has already running and using for Accounting.

Another legacy system; ERP 6.0 EHP7 is still running including some modules... HCM is a part of them, so, they want to migrate to SAP S/4HANA. 
The point is including Japanese specific table can be included or not..
For example, Info type and cluster tables..

Or, do you have other idea to approach this case?

And also I appreciate you to share some successful points in this case..
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Manual Bank statement issue.
entry.content:
Hi Aman,

 

the postings happen always in the defined account currency. You can define it and read more about it here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/651d8af3ea974ad1a4d74449122c620e/cb91d7531a4d414de10000000a174cb4.html

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

Is SAP Data Services Designer 4.2 is compatible with Windows Server 2019?.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Services Designer 4.2 and Windows Server 201...
entry.content:
As per the product availability matrix, SAP Data Services Designer 4.2 SP14 and above are compatible with Windows Server 2019.

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/launchpad/en_us/pam/pam-essentials/TIP/PAM_DataServices_4_2.pdf

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: 单据实际打印内容被截断
entry.content: 請問使用PDF輸出會正常嗎?

entry.title: Re: Size tmpfs File System for Hana Fast Restart
entry.content: The tmpfs filesystem, stored in RAM, directly affects available RAM. Allocating 5TB to tmpfs reserves that RAM, making it unavailable for other processes. Your system has 2.6TB of free RAM, so allocating 5TB to tmpfs would overcommit your RAM, potentially causing errors and instability. This is likely why your OS team is reluctant to implement the requested tmpfs size. Consider reducing your tmpfs size to fit within your available RAM, increasing your RAM for larger tmpfs, or using a different method for faster Hana restarts that requires less RAM. Ensure your tmpfs size aligns with your free RAM to avoid issues.

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman

If i use loop i have problems for perfomance

entry.title: Re: SQL query to calculate delivery dates for the Frame Agreements (Sale Blanket Agreement)
entry.content: hi Joihan, Hi Johan, If you see the query posted, the Delivery Date is calculated. Please find the attached screenshot. I wish to get correct Delivery dates based the Frequency - Monthly, Annual, Once, Weekly etc. In SAP, except Frquency "Occuring Once", for other like Monthly, Annual, the dates are not specified, Hence I need to get all delivery dates for specified frequencies for Frame Agreements.

entry.title: Re: SQL query to calculate delivery dates for the Frame Agreements (Sale Blanket Agreement)
entry.content: I also tried running another version with different logic. CASE WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'M' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'A' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'O' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'W' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'Q' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'S' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") END AS "DeliveryDate"

entry.title: Re: Announcement: New release of content and central entry point for SAP BTP Solution Diagrams
entry.content:
@jrondorf Thanks for reaching out - we will update the template soon to use standard fonts only since it is too complicated to use them in publicly used templates. If you want to proceed you are welcome to use Microsoft Arial instead.

kind regards

Liza

entry.title: Recurring Schedule of Performance Forms for New hires
entry.content:
Hello Community, We are trying to set up a recurring auto-schedule of Performance Forms for new hires during the year. We were trying to use the Launch Forms option and there set-up a schedule however for us it doesn't give the expected result in terms of the Form End and Due Date.

For us the Form End and Due are Fixed (every year the 28th February) and not relative to the Hire date of the employee.

Did any of you face similar challenge? Or do you have any advise how to reach the same End Date/Due date for the launched forms?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Default company code no longer set automatically in some fiori apps.
entry.content:
Hello!

We are currently faced with an issue with default company code in the below FIORI apps.

- Park General Journal Entries

- Create Outgoing Invoices

- Create Incoming Invoices

The issue is that until recently, once we select a company code the opening these apps, we didn't have to type the company code in again even if we access fiori again. However, these apps now asks for company code every time I access these apps after signing out. 

Previously, once we typed in the company code in this screen, these apps saved the company code as default and next time we open these apps, the company code is already set.

The only thing that's changed before and after this issue is the user parameter as below

Any idea what might have caused this change?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Vacancy of field to get shown in picklist as grey out
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has this following ask.

Is it feasible to Grey out the value in picklist which all are used by some employee. For example- if company has assigned "Flat no-203" to one employee, then for others the "203" flat should get greyout.

Please let us know the feasibility.

entry.title: Re: Change value of fields of an internal table without loop
entry.content:
You can fix performance on READ TABLE. It could be the same performance issue with constructor expressions.

The first thing to do is to use SORTED or HASHED tables instead of STANDARD. By default, you should never use STANDARD tables (use them only in the rare cases of doing a unique loop at all the lines).

entry.title: Quarter Allotment MDF
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has this following ask.

Inside quarter allotment MDF we have a field called Permanent and temporary. The requirement here is if we are selecting Permanent then in Compensation Information portlet(Standard portlet) HRA (Pay component) won't be visible.

We tried to achieve through rule but it is not working. Is it feasible ?

entry.title: Can we assign two matrix manager to a single employee in system
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has this following ask.

Can we assign two matrix manager to a single employee in system. For example- now we only can assign one matrix manager to a employee so in system he will get shown as dotted line manager for the employee in system. Can we assign two dotted line manager?

 

Please let us know the feasibility.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_IDENTITY_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE/e12d8683adfa4471ac4edd40809b9038/7a9c45d4f057473681c6b807fc1cc60a.html?version=CLOUDFOUNDRY

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Integration Suite - New Message Metrics
entry.content:
@paszy2 

It’s because there is a splitter used in the image.  Point 3 in the “Special Notes” section: In case of integration flows using splitter, each split outbound message via receiver adapter(s) is counted as separate message (subject to size and logic as mentioned above). Size of input message to splitter is 210 KB.

 

Thanks,
Marty

entry.title: Re: The Substitute of MM50 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Thank you for this great sharing!

entry.title: Re: API to fetch API endpoint, Organization, Space detail...
entry.content:
You could use the Provisioning Service to find out this information. The Provisioning Service has the Environments APIs , which can deliver information for the available environments in your subaccount like:

 curl -X GET -H "Content-type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${TOKEN}" https://provisioning-service.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/provisioning/v1/environments | jq .

{
  "environmentInstances": [
    {
      "id": "<env-id>",
      "name": "<name>",
      "brokerId": "<borker-id>",
      "globalAccountGUID": "<ga-guid",
      "subaccountGUID": "<subaccount-guid>",
      "tenantId": "<tenant-id>",
      "serviceId": "<service-id>",
      "planId": "<plan-id>",
      "operation": "update",
      "parameters": "{\"instance_name\":\"<instance-name>\",\"status\":\"ACTIVE\"}",
      "labels": "{\"API Endpoint\":\"https://api.cf.<region>.hana.ondemand.com\",\"Org Name\":\"<my-org-name>\",\"Org ID\":\"<my-org-id>\",\"Org Memory Limit\":\"7,168MB\"}",
      "customLabels": {},
      "type": "Update",
      "status": "Processed",
      "environmentType": "cloudfoundry",
      "landscapeLabel": "cf-<region>",
      "platformId": "<platform-name>",
      "createdDate": 1668075444498,
      "modifiedDate": 1701415487392,
      "state": "OK",
      "stateMessage": "<some-state-msg>",
      "serviceName": "cloudfoundry",
      "planName": "standard"
    }
  ]
}

 All the values in "<>" have been replaced by me. From the response we can see that CF API endpoint, CF org name and org ID are present as labels. I found the documentation of the service useful and you require the service plan "local-viewer", which wasn't obvious for me.

entry.title: Important Update: Changes to the Free Tier Option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Dear free tier users of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment,

Please be advised of an important upcoming change affecting the free tier option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment.

 

Summary

Change effective April 3, 2024: Introduction of a 90-day limit for the free tier option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment

Starting from April 3, 2024, the free tier option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment will be subject to a 90-day time limit. This change is being implemented to align with SAP’s service policies and ensure the efficient utilization of resources.

 

Key points to note

Usage purpose: The free tier option is designed for small proof-of-concept development projects. It can also be used for the piloting of a remote ABAP Test Cockpit scenario against on-premise systems in the Custom Code Migration app. As part of this change, we are delighted to announce that limitations on the number of 500 repository objects and 10 ATC (ABAP Test Cockpit) runs will no longer apply.

  • Seamless transition to standard plan: Within the 90-day period, users have the option to seamlessly transition to the standard plan without any risk of data loss, ensuring a smooth continuation of their SAP BTP ABAP Environment usage.
  • Deletion of SAP BTP ABAP Environment instances: After the 90-day trial period, the SAP BTP ABAP Environment instances for the free tier option will be immediately deleted afterwards. It is important to note that users are advised to backup all important data before this period ends. 
  • Backing up your development objects: To ensure the safety of development objects, we recommend to use abapGit and export the objects in a git repository of your choice. Please refer to the abapGit documentation.
  • Automatic instance stoppage: Instances under the free tier option will be automatically stopped each night. Users will need to restart the instance using the Landscape Portal when needed. 
  • Community support only: Free tier service plans will continue to receive community support only and will not be subject to Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
  • Notification about the trial period:
    • Email notifications to system administrators prior to the trial period, 30 days before the expiration and a final reminder 7 days before the trial period expires
    • Notification in SAP Fiori Launchpad with a title “Your trial period will expire on dd.mm.yyyy”
    • Notifications in ABAP Development Tools as System Message in the Feed Reader

The following screenshot shows the title starting on April, 3  2024, which refers to the upcoming expiry of the trial period in SAP Fiori Launchpad.

The following screenshot shows the system message within the Feed Reader starting on April, 3  2024, providing information about the expiration of the trial period in ADT.

Important note: All SAP BTP ABAP Environment instances, both existing before and created after April 3, 2024, will be affected by this change. The initial deletion of systems is scheduled for July 2, 2024. Please plan accordingly and take the necessary actions to avoid any disruptions.

We understand that this change may impact your trial usage, and we appreciate your understanding as we strive to enhance the overall user experience.

If you prefer not to transition to a standard service plan after the 90-day free tier trial period, there are alternative trial options available to try out ABAP, including the SAP BTP ABAP Environment shared-trial and the ABAP Platform trial.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to sap_btp_abap_environment@sap.com.

Thank you for your continued use of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment.

entry.title: sap_tradeshow theme customized but kept in same name; logo.png and backgroundimg.png is missing
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

sap_tradeshow theme customized but kept in same name; logo.png and backgroundimg.png is missing in themes downloaded from sap portal 7.31

It is missing in sap portal custom sap_tradeshow.zip extracted from server location:

/usr/sap/<SID>/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/com.sap.portal.design.portaldesigndata/servlet_jsp/com.sap.portal.design.portaldesigndata/root/themes/its/designs

 

Need help from you, thanks.

 

Thanks

Kaushik Banerjee

SAP Portal

entry.title: IlegalArgumentException: Can not decode NULL or empty string.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone!

Our Client has both an SRM application & Enterprise portal.

The Purpose of our SRM system is "To provide an e-tendering platform for managing the entire procurement of BMC across various departments. The platform is used for publishing and inviting responses for regular tenders as well as quotations. Further, EMD is accepted online."

 

On our Client website, the Encryption & Decryption mechanism is configured. A bid done by a vendor on the Client's Website. It will get encrypted So that no one will see the bid amount. After that, we log in to the SRM Enterprise Portal and click the Decrypt BID then the amount will get decrypted. But we are facing inconsistency here.

There are two bids, 1 bid is decrypted and able to view the amount but while decrypting the 2nd bid, it throws a below error. Also, attached the screenshots for your reference.

 

IlegalArgumentException: Can not decode NULL or empty string.
Further issue details: java. lang. IlegaArgumentException: Can not decode NULL or empty string.
at com.sap.india.srm.purchaserdecryptbid.PurchaserBase64Utilities.base64Decode(PurchaserBase64Utlities.java:54)
at com.sap.india.srm.purchaserdecryptbid.PurchaserDecAssembleBrokenKey.processAssemblingBrokenKeyPurchaserDecAssembleBrokenKey.java:307)
at com.sap.india.srm.purchaserdecryptbid.PurchaserDecAssembleBrokenKey.processDecryptAllBid(PurchaserDecAssembleBrokenKey.java:218)
at com.sap.india.sm.purchaserdecryptbid.PurchaserDecAssembleBrokenKey.init(PurchaserDecAssembleBrokenKey.java: 144)
at com.sap.india.srm.purchaserdecryptbid.PurchaserDecAssembleBrokenKey.startPurchaserOperationsPurchaserDecAssembleBrokenKey.java:76)
at com.sap.india.sm.main.MainApplet.start(MainApplet.java: 119)
at com.sun.deploy.uitoolkit.impl.awt.AWTAppletAdapter.start(Unknown Source)
at sun.plugin2.applet.Plugin2Manager$AppletExecutionRunnable.run(Unknown Source)
at java.lang. Thread.run Unknown Source)

 

Kindly help me out to resolve the issue.

 

Thanks in Advance!

Best Regards,

Azarudin

entry.title: PRD/Custom Report - Only Single User do not appear if set "Date Filter" while pulling out the Report
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a Custom Report called as " Total Learning Hours - Learning History" - That shows/calculate Total Learning Hours against each user.

Issue - Only single user do not appear if we set "Date Filter" while pulling out the Report. But, If we pull out the same report without date filter, The same affected user appears.

Observations ;

a) Confirmed that the Affected Single User & Remaining User's who are appearing in the reports are from the same security domain.

b) Confirmed that the affected user is Active in the system.

c) Affected User - Only 1

Could you please tell us, what is the issue at PRD/Query Side? How can we resolve this issue?

Screenshot is Attached for reference.

1) Without Date Filter

2) With Date Filter

 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @giulia-felappi & @GCET 

Thank you for reaching out and expressing your concerns regarding the validity period of the authorization token. At present, our system unfortunately does not support automatic renewal of tokens.

We understand the inconvenience this may cause, and please rest assured that we are actively discussing on this feature. Once token auto-renewal becomes part of our development roadmap, we'll make sure to communicate this update through our official channels, keeping all our valued customers informed.

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Thanks for you answer Mahesh. Is this technically possible like have a Colombia program EDOC_CO_QUERY_RANGES to retrieve technical Key? If yes, Do you think can we put a date in the Roadmap to be deliverable?

Thanks a lot!

BR

Gaspar

entry.title: Re: BAPI_FIXEDASSET_CREATE1 with equipment synchronization
entry.content:
Did you look for OSS notes relevant for your versions (notes such as 2999629 - Japan: CSMD - Time-dependent Fields Are Incorrect When You Execute BAPI_FIXEDASSET_CREATE1 Multiple Times )

if you don't find any suitable notes, you could try to execute the BAPI in another session

* Execute in a separate session
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_FIXEDASSET_CREATE1'
  DESTINATION 'NONE'
    " (...)
    TABLES
      return         = lt_return.
* Commit the changes within this session
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
  DESTINATION 'NONE'
    EXPORTING wait = 'X'.
* Close the session.
CALL FUNCTION 'RFC_CONNECTION_CLOSE'
  EXPORTING destination = 'NONE'
  EXCEPTIONS OTHERS = 0.

So no data will be shared between successive calls due to explicit close.

entry.title: Crystal reports Displaying all parts of a product structure
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m new to Crystal Reports and I’m currently working on a project where I need to display all parts of our product structure in a report. I have successfully established a data link, but for some reason, the report only shows one of several parts of the product structure.

To give you a bit more context, I have a main product and each product has a structure (1-10 parts). However, only one of these parts is visible in the report. I’ve been wondering if this could be related to the fact that the data field of the structure uses and reads data like the data source of my main product. Could this be affecting the visibility of the other parts in the report? Should i be using subreport instead? if so, how?

I’ve checked my data links and they seem to be functioning correctly. I’m not sure why the other parts aren’t showing up. Any advice or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

 

SAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: URL for uploaded document
entry.content:
Hi,

We have uploaded Exit Interview form to "Manage Documents".

Is there any way to get the URL pointing to this document so that we can embed it in the notification email and the offboardee can download it by clicking the URL?

Or any other tool that supports uploaded documents URL in SF.

Kindly advise.

Thank you

entry.title: Our business is seeking to generate 6 Sigma control charts directly from SAP, rather than using Exce
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Our business is seeking to generate 6 Sigma control charts directly from SAP, rather than using Excel as we currently do. While QGC3 transactions can generate control charts, they do not meet our specific requirements. Our business logic necessitates comparing the results of the last 60 inspection lots to plot the control chart based on the output. Additionally, we require the same Excel functionalities, such as filtering charts based on the filter condition system to regenerate the control charts. We would greatly appreciate any guidance on this issue by providing FMs or references. Please be aware that our business SAP version is EHP6, and we need to generate these charts within this version. Thank you for your help.

Regards,
Sanoob Thambi / 9003050156

entry.title: Re: Missing key components during redefinition processs
entry.content:
I have the same problem in SEGW, redefinition process missed key fields in Entities.

Service Project FDP_V3_BD_STANDARD_LO_GLO_GEN

Service FDP_V3_BD_STANDARD_LO_GLO_GEN_SRV

Original Entity DownPaymentNode

Copied Entity DownPaymentNode missing key field BillingDocument

With other services it worked before, I have problem with this service today 15.3.2014.

You can manually add the key fields (around 2-3 minutes pro field).

It seems a standard fk up (sry for word use, I am a bit upset now), a patch may be coming.

entry.title: Consignment Fill-Up - Intrastat Declaration
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on S4H Cloud public environment and I would like to know if it is possible to report the transfert to a consignement stock (CCFU) ? Indeed, we did not create any invoice so I don't know how I can get the lines.

 

Thanks in advance,

Regards,
Nicolas.

entry.title: Inbound Interface to receive the UUID, PDF and XML details through ODATA - MEXICO
entry.content:
Requirement

In Mexico, it is necessary that all companies receive tax authority validated XML and PDF files that contain the details of the payment made to vendors.

Its mandatory to extract the UUID number from the file that is received from the vendors and save it in a way that makes it easily accessible, in S4 it would be easier to store it in a custom table.

The importance of this interface is to store UUID in S4 system in order to facilitate users identify which invoices were payed to which vendors as well as reconciliation between EDICOM Portal and S4 system. The risk of not having this interface, is that files (PDF and XML) and UUID data will only be stored in EDICOM Portal and reconciliation to corresponding payments would be time consuming for users.   

Technical Requirement

Interaction of SAP with EDICOM portal where SAP CPI is the middleware which sends the XML, PDF to S4. The technical requirement was to create a ODATA which can receive XML and PDF, also should extract UUID details from XML structure and update it to the respective document.

Simple flow chart:

Detailed Flow chart:

                  

Technical Solution

To receive and extract the details from XML file, ODATA interface is developed and the received XML and PDF files are attached to the respective FI document.

XML and PDF files are sent in base64 encoded format from SAP CPI then in S4 we make use of various function modules to convert it and make the attachment.

Created ODATA service in tcode SEGW - ZFI_PAYMENT_COMPLEMENT_002

In Data model the custom table ZFI_IF020_PAYCOM is used to give ODATA the reference structure. The last two fields ZPDF & ZXML are created in RAWSTRING format to store the XML and PDF files.

Regenerate the Runtime Artifact ZCL_ZFI_PAYMENT_COM_01_DPC_EXT

This gives us the class where we can write the required logic, here we have redefined the method PAY_COMPSET_CREATE_ENTITY – holds the logic to validate the inputs received from SAP CPI and the logic to add PDF and XML to the FI document.

FI_DOCUMENT_CHANGE FM is used to update UUID to the respecting FI document.

The above FM is passed with the required importing parameters.

PDF Attachment:

PDF file is sent in Base64 format from CPI to S4.

  • SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY – using this FM the received base64 format is converted to binary
  • ARCHIV_CREATE_TABLE – using this FM the converted binary file is attached to the FI document

XML Attachment:

XML is also sent in Base64 format from CPI to S4.

  • SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY – using this FM the received base64 format is converted to binary
  • SO_CONVERT_CONTENTS_BIN – to get the binary file in tab format
  • SO_FOLDER_ROOT_ID_GET – this FM is used to fetch the folder ID
  • SO_OBJECT_INSERT – used to insert the converted XML file
  • BINARY_RELATION_CREATE_COMMIT – create relation between attachment and the document (Reference code is attached)

If there is any error in the attachment the file is sent to AL11.

All the received inputs including XML and PDF are saved in a custom table.

Report:

Tcode - ZFI_PAYCOMP_MONITOR

A report is created to display the details received using custom table in which the entries made through ODATA Service and displayed in ALV format.

User can view the error details in description and also can select and reprocess the particular file after updating the missed details.

Created and activated the service ZFI_PAYMENT_COMPLEMENT_002_SRV in following tcode /n/iwfnd/maint_service

The ICF Node should be in active status as shown in the screenshot.

Hope this helps someone! 😊

 

OData NW ABAP Gateway (OData)

entry.title: Vote for Enhancement Request: People Search Box in Continuous Performance
entry.content:
Hi all,

Please vote for enhancement request: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/319054

In the Goals page, a manager has a search box available to them where they can type the direct reports name to find them. This is very user friendly for the manager when they have a large number of direct reports.

However, when they go to the Continuous Performance Page, they have to scroll through the names to find the person they are looking for.  

If the same functionality was available on the continuous performance page it would make it easier for the manager to find their direct report.  It would also increase consistency in usability in SuccessFactors.

SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals 

Kind regards,
Helen

entry.title: Re: Ignore Hard coding in S4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Hard code mean when for example you specified number of storage location in the code, instead if using tvarvc parameter.

entry.title: Create Permission role to have only view access to Employee Central configuration
entry.content:
1. To Make Manage Business configuration as View Only 

In Permission Role, Section: Manage Business Configuration-->All different sections in Manage Business Configuration will be visible as objects and Grant only view access to all sections

Outcome:

No Option to Edit configuration in BCUI

 

2. To Make Configure Object definition as view only

First Secure the object "Object Definition(GOObjectDefinition)" in configure Object Definitions

Now there will be new permission "Object Definition" under Miscellaneous Permission in Permission Role, Grant only view access. Also Grant "Configure Object Definition" access under Metadata Framework

 

Outcome:

No Option to Edit object configuration in Configure Object Definition

 

3. To Make Picklist as view only

Secure the object "Picklist" (Follow same steps as Step 2)

Now there will be new permission "Picklist" under Miscellaneous Permission in Permission Role, Grant only view access. Also  "Configure Object Definition" access under Metadata Framework required to access Picklist Center

Outcome:

Error while trying to edit or create picklist

 

 

4.To Make Business rule as view only

Secure the object "Rule" (Follow same steps as Step 2)

Now there will be new permission "Rule" under Miscellaneous Permission in Permission Role, Grant only view access. Also  "Configure Business Rule" access under Metadata Framework required.

Outcome:

System is not saving the Business rule when you click on "Save".

entry.title: Precision in Action: Admin-Controlled Picklist Updates for SuccessFactors Excellence
entry.content:
Ensuring Precision: A Step-by-Step Guide to Admin-Controlled Picklist Updates in SuccessFactors

Step 1: Secure the Object Picklist in Configure Object Definitions.

 

 

Step 2: Unlock the "Picklist" permission under Miscellaneous Permissions in the Permission Role. Grant Insert and Correct access. (Remember to provide "Configure Object Definition" access under Metadata Framework to access Picklist Center)

 

Step 3: While Granting this Permission role, Define the MDF target for the required picklist as below.

 

Outcome:

Admins accessing the Picklist Center will now see only the defined picklists, allowing edits exclusively to those picklists.

Attempting to create a new picklist will result in an error, ensuring precision in picklist management

entry.title: Stock in Transit quantity discrepancy with PO Quantity while doing Delivery.
entry.content:
Stock in Transit quantity discrepancy with PO Quantity while doing Delivery.

Issue:

When conducting deliveries based on purchase orders (PO), such as stock transfer orders, the PO may consist of multiple line items with varying quantities and different units of measures. Occasionally, quantities, particularly for food products, may involve decimals.

In such instances, the accurate transfer of quantities to transit and the proper updating of the corresponding MSSQ table may encounter challenges due to rounding issues.

Due to these discrepancies, there will be slight variations between the quantity specified in the purchase order (PO) and the stock in transit.

This leads to a quantity discrepancy that prevents users from performing the Post Goods Issue (PGI).

 

The specific error is as follows:

 

The Root Cause of the Issue:

Typically, in such instances, the stock in transit appears accurate, but discrepancies arise in the MSSQ table due to rounding issues stemming from the purchase order (PO).

 

According to the current calculation, 10.140 B17 equals 0.511 MT. However, the MSSQ table reflects only 0.506 MT, leading to an error during the Post Goods Issue (PGI) process, indicating that the quantity exceeds by 0.005 MT.

When attempting to post the differential quantity using 561, it should impact the Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) as the material is associated with project stock.

 

Solution:

The resolution involves executing MIGO with movement type 558.

Below fields are the Inputs in MIGO

  • Transaction code: MIGO.
  • Type: Goods Issue.
  • Reference Document: Others.
  • Movement type: 558 with Project Stock – Q
  • Material: - XXXXXXXXXX
  • Quantity: - 0.005
  • WBS: XXXX.XX.XXX.XXXX
  • Batch: 7XXXXXXXXX

 

 

After MIGO:

Following the MIGO process with movement type 558, the stock will be corrected, and the system will permit the Post Goods Issue (PGI).

 

Implementing this solution will have no impact on the actual quantity and budget.

 

Parameters required:

  1. Difference Quantity.
  2. WBS Element.
  3. Movement type 558.

 

Summary:
In instances where stock discrepancies arise between purchase orders (PO) and deliveries, caused by rounding issues, and particularly for Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) based materials, the recommended solution is to use the MIGO transaction with movement type 558 to post the differential quantity.

This approach ensures that the stock is adjusted without affecting the actual quantities or budget.

entry.title: Re: Missing key components during redefinition processs
entry.content: Simplest way to correct manually is to right click on entity and choose import and later mark it as a key field

entry.title: Boosting Business Success with Procurement Analytics: A Journey Paved with Numbers
entry.content:
Grasping Procurement Analytics

In my career, procurement analytics has piqued my interest and kept me engrossed because it combines two essential elements - numbers and procurement. Put simply, procurement analytics is all about utilizing data and numbers to improve buying decisions.

It does this by delving into past expenditure data, understanding the current scenario, and predicting future trends, making our buying decisions smarter and more precise.

I have found procurement analytics to be an effective tool in every decision-making process relating to purchases.

Why Procurement Analytics Matters

Procurement can be a bit like a very complicated puzzle - and to solve it, you need a good grip on numbers and data. That's where procurement analytics comes in handy. It uses numbers to make things more simple and more efficient. I've found, and seen with other successful businesses, that it's a tool you can use to improve processes, boost productivity, and compete better in the global market.

Here are some quite compelling reasons for that:

Real-World Impact of Procurement Analytics

Assisting procurement departments in their decision-making processes, procurement analytics has proven to be a significant game changer in businesses. For example, companies can use it to uncover saving opportunities that may have been previously overlooked.

It doesn't just stop at highlighting saving opportunities; procurement analytics can also greatly improve the way procurement departments interact and work with their suppliers. By using data collected through analytics, procurement teams can have a deeper understanding of supplier performance, helping them ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations more effectively.

This practical application of procurement analytics provides real value to companies and their procurement departments, aiding them in making more informed and effective decisions that improve their bottom line.

If you search a bit on the web, you can generally find that:

Best-in-class companies implemented procurement analytics and observed a 12% reduction in procurement costs within six months, which also led to a 15% increase in turnover. 

Using analytics, they improved poorly-performing suppliers' productivity by 4%, positively impacting overall productivity.

Risk Management with Procurement Analytics

Procurement analytics can be a potent tool for risk management within procurement departments. It gives them the ability to anticipate potential problems well in advance before they spin into major issues. For instance, during a crisis such as the COVID-19 pandemic, procurement analytics could be utilized to foresee potential disruptions in supply chains. This forward-looking approach helps procurement departments plan effectively, ensuring a smoother, more resilient operation despite the challenging circumstances.

If you search a bit on the web, you can find that:

During the COVID-19 pandemic, similar best-in-class companies used procurement analytics to identify potential supply chain disruptions, saving approximately 8% of potential losses.

Boosting Competitiveness with Procurement Analytics

Procurement analytics also plays a key role in enhancing the competitiveness of procurement departments. By harnessing the data provided by this tool, departments can streamline their processes in areas such as product design and engineering. This can lead to significant reductions in costs and improvements in quality, giving them an edge over competitors.

The data-driven insights from procurement analytics can guide a procurement department in making strategic decisions that not only yield immediate improvements but also set the stage for long-term success. This makes it an indispensable tool for procurement departments seeking to optimize their operations and boost their competitive position in the market.

If you search a bit on the web, you can generally find that:

The top-tier companies streamlined operational processes with analytics, reducing operational costs by 11% and improving their product quality metrics by 7%.

With strategic decisions informed by analytics, these improvements led to a quarterly profits increase of 5%, boosting their overall market position.

In Conclusion

From my perspective, using procurement analytics isn't just optional - it's necessary as procurement analytics can help improve various business processes.

I'm curious to hear about your experiences. Have you used data analytics in your business? Do you see how procurement analytics could be a advantage in your operations? Drop your thoughts or questions in the comments below!

And if you found this post helpful, do share it within your business circle. Because when we share knowledge, we all benefit! Let's keep learning together!

Read more about SAP Ariba Spend Analysis and keep an eye on our SAP Road Map in this area.

Regards

Lars

SAP Ariba Spend Analysis

entry.title: Signed invoice
entry.content:
Hello everyone ;
i wanna know if there is a way in SAP than i can follow up signed invoice.
when the transporter give the marchendise to the clinet , the client , signed the invoice and return it to us , and we will wait the period that we agree about like a month..then we wll give to the agent that collect the money the signed invoice and give it back to the client and take the money . basicely we only follow up this with excel.but i want to integrated in sap .in excel we fellow up how many signed and also the invoice that the agent have and how much we hack in stock and the amount and the activity.its similar to what we have in ZCOB or FBL5N.

entry.title: Re: SAC support for BW Time- and Version-dependent hierarchies
entry.content:
Hi thanks for this great info but we have an issue with this.

How did you set the variables, both the hierarchy variable and the version variable? Can they be edited? With or without a default value?

We have implemented the notes, but the version-dependent hierarchy is not updated in SAC. It retains the default hierarchy if there is one in the bex request, or otherwise the one entered in the selection prompt on the SAC side.

BR

entry.title: Add item description as a column to the item dashboard
entry.content:
Hello,

Our user want the field "Description" from the item overlay made available as a column in the item dashboard.
As far as I could find out the field /RPM/TV_SHORT_TEXT needs to be present in the structure RPM_ITEM_ATTR.
Adding it via a customer structure does not work since it's value is classified as STRING but the relevant structures are all set to Enhancement category: Can be enhanced (character-like or numeric).

Is there any (easy) way to add said field to the item dashboard column list without the need to change structures or deep programming knowledge?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Ignore Hard coding in S4HANA Cloud
entry.content: For example I have BADI BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM and can add custom logic in cloud app to block material mvt to specific storage location without reservation. I want to have parameter in tvarvc to change SL any time in prod system. As tvarvc table is not available in tvarvc I can use only hardcoding of SL number in code, that is not good.

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 8
entry.content:
Here are the resources mentioned in this episode:

  • Code Connect event https://code-connect.dev/ 
  • This week's SAP Developer News https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yP27M5hckIY 
  • March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 2 https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/march-developer-challenge-cloudevents-week-2/m-p/13635719 
  • Our working repo https://github.com/qmacro/capb2b
  • (Capire) Common reuse types https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/common#code-types 
  • NPM package that supplies ISO data for CAP common reuse types https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/cds-common-content 
  • ISO content for common CAP types https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/iso-content-for-common-cap-types/ba-p/13637780 / https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2024/03/12/iso-content-for-common-cap-types/ 
  • Service integration with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CodeJam) https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-service-integration-codejam/
  • Milano Centrale railway station https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Milano_Centrale_railway_station 
  • (Capire) Views and projections https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/cdl#views-and-projections 
  • (Capire) Configuration profiles https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/cds-env#profiles 
  • (Capire) Hybrid testing (running locally but with a remote persistence layer in e.g. HANA, with the "hybrid" profile) https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/hybrid-testing 
  • Combine SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack Applications (CodeJam) https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-hana-exercises-codejam
  • Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ("Curiouser and curiouser!") https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alice%27s_Adventures_in_Wonderland 
  • (Capire) Managed :1 Associations https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/domain-modeling#managed-1-associations
  • Back to basics: Managed associations in CAP (playlist, covering many-to-many associations) https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQCSm1JSRzeBE-BlkygKRAAF 
  • So, You Want to Host a CodeJam! Everything you need to know https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/so-you-want-to-host-a-codejam-everything-you-need-to-know/ba-p/221415 
  • OData System Query Option $expand https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.0/errata03/os/complete/part2-url-conventions/odata-v4.0-errata03-os-part2-url-conventions-complete.html#_Toc453752359

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Supplier Management 2H 2023_Stay Current
entry.content:
Hi @fgaraujo1984 

It will change not right away. 

  1. Please check whether you skipped an assessment to stay current after you passed the SAP Certification exam. If you did, your SAP Certification is no longer valid, and your digital badge will be expired. You can check your completed deltas in the "Learning History" tile on the SAP Learning Hub. In that case you will need to get re-certified via the SAP Certification Hub.

  2. If you did complete the required delta assessment within the respective time period, please check if your email address for taking the assessment to stay current is different than the email address where your SAP Certification is stored (your PT number). In such case, you need to transfer the core certification from your previous user to your new user under which you take the assessment. Information on how to get your certificates transferred can be found here.

  3. If your digital badge is expired, even though you have finished all assessments to stay current and your email address with your SAP Certification is the same as the email address you are using to complete the assessment to stay current and on Credly, please create a ticket in the User Support Center under the category “Digital Badge".

You can find more information on our How to check your SAP Certification stay current status document.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Dynamically print PO line items and respective servic...
entry.content:
Add a LOOP node under your main TABLE / LOOP node, just under the item details, use a where condition on the PO/item numbers.

  • Processing Loops and Tables (SAP Library - SAP Smart Forms

entry.title: Re: PR Generated For Obsolete Materials
entry.content: Hi, There is a possibility that the PR created in previous MRP run before marking the status as obsolete. PR will not get deleted in subsequent runs even with planning mode 3, because it’s blocked for MRP. Can you delete the PR (ME52N) and re execute the MRP again for the same material to see if new PR number is getting generated.?

entry.title: Re: Iflow HTTP Oauth authentication unsupported grant type error 400
entry.content: Is the request successful if you use other tools such as Postman?

entry.title: Re: Help editing this query to allow for filtering by OIT...
entry.content:
Hi @alplam ,

Use following Query, You will get Active Button in Filter,

SELECT IG."ItmsGrpNam", IW."ItemCode", IM."ItemName", IW."WhsCode", ISNULL(IW."OnHand",0) AS "OnHand",
'' AS "Batch", '' AS "InDate",IM."validFor" as "Active"
FROM OITW IW
INNER JOIN OITM IM ON IW."ItemCode" = IM."ItemCode" AND IM."InvntItem" = 'Y' AND
IM."ManBtchNum" = 'N' AND IM."validFor" = 'Y'
INNER JOIN OITB IG ON IM."ItmsGrpCod" = IG."ItmsGrpCod"

UNION ALL

SELECT IG."ItmsGrpNam",IW."ItemCode", IM."ItemName", IW."WhsCode", ISNULL(BQ."Quantity",0) AS "OnHand",
BN."DistNumber" AS "Batch", BN."InDate",IM."validFor" as "Active"
FROM OITW IW
INNER JOIN OITM IM ON IW."ItemCode" = IM."ItemCode" AND IM."InvntItem" = 'Y' AND IM."ManBtchNum" = 'Y'
INNER JOIN OITB IG ON IM."ItmsGrpCod" = IG."ItmsGrpCod"
LEFT OUTER JOIN OBTQ BQ ON IW."ItemCode" = BQ."ItemCode" AND BQ."WhsCode" = IW."WhsCode"
LEFT OUTER JOIN OBTN BN ON BQ."MdAbsEntry" = BN."AbsEntry"
WHERE ISNULL(BQ."Quantity",0) <> 0

Thanks,
Prudhvi.

entry.title: HOW TO CHANGE COUNTER BASED MAINTENANCE PLAN INTERVAL IF COUNTER IS CHANGED?
entry.content:
Hello,

How to change counter based (hour) maintenance plan interval, if counter meter (h) is changed during interval and new counter start 0h (cannot set current hour value to meter)?

Example (strategig hierarchical)

1.Maintenance "small" 500 hour

2.Maintenance "medium" 1500 hour

3. Maintenance "big" 3000 Hour

Counter rmeter change in 250 h

entry.title: IoT ChitChat with Marc Pous
entry.content:
We're thrilled to announce a special edition of the Labs Talk podcast – "IoT ChitChat with Marc Pous," featuring our hosts Sven Haiges & Andreas Neumeier along with guest Marc Pous from Balena. The episode, scheduled for Mar 20 at 15:00 CET, promises a deep dive into the intricate world of the Internet of Things (IoT).


In the upcoming session, our esteemed guests will unravel the current state of connectedness in the IoT realm, shedding light on the latest trends and challenges that define this dynamic landscape. Marc Pous, a true IoT superstar, brings his wealth of experience, having founded thethings.io and currently contributing to Balena's secure container-based technology stack.


The conversation will explore the profound influence of IoT on Customer Experience, delving into how innovative solutions like Balena's empower developers to shape, deploy, manage, and scale fleets of IoT Linux devices securely. The hosts and Marc, having shared the Oktoberfest of Things workshops in Munich, bring a unique blend of technical expertise and a touch of camaraderie to the discussion.


As businesses increasingly pivot towards sustainable practices, the podcast will also touch upon the pivotal role IoT plays in shaping sustainable initiatives. From reducing environmental impact to optimizing operational efficiency, the impact of IoT on sustainability is a crucial aspect of the conversation.


Mark your calendars for this insightful podcast episode that promises to unveil the intricacies of IoT, discuss the current trends, and explore its transformative influence on Customer Experience and Sustainability. Stay tuned for a riveting discussion that goes beyond the surface of technology, providing a comprehensive view of the IoT landscape.

entry.title: Re: Suggestion about SAP APO courses?
entry.content:
Hi @luislboschettij
I had to remove one course since it is not any longer offered on SAP Training Shop. 
In case a link is not working for you, please share it with me, then I can check. 
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 batch cost used in goods issue
entry.content:
Hi @mark_ownby ,

Use following Query which give Batch Wise Cost for all transactions.

select
(case when T0."DocType"='60' then 'SO' when T0."DocType"='59' then 'SI' when T0."DocType"='162' then 'MR' when T0."DocType"='67' then 'IM' end) as "Type",
T0."DocEntry",T1."BaseNum",T1."DocDate",T0."ItemCode",T1."ItemName",T1."WhsCode",
(case when T0."ActionType"='1' then T0."Quantity" when T0."ActionType"='2' then -T0."Quantity" else 0 end) as "Quantity",T1."BatchNum",

T2."MnfSerial" as "Potency",T2."LotNumber" as "AR NUM",T2."ExpDate" as "Expiry Date",
(case when T0."ActionType"='1' then T0."Quantity"*T0."Cost" when T0."ActionType"='2' then -T0."Quantity"*T0."Cost" else 0 end) as "Value",
MonthName(T1."DocDate") as "Month",YEAR(T1."DocDate") as "Year",T0."MdAbsEntry" as "Line"

from OBVL T0 inner join IBT1_LINK T1 on T0."DocEntry"=T1."BaseEntry" and T0."DocType"=T1."BaseType" and T0."DocLineNum"=T1."BaseLinNum"
and T0."ITLEntry"=T1."LogEntry" and T0."ItemCode"=T1."ItemCode" and T0."DistNumber"=T1."BatchNum"
inner join OBTN T2 on T2."DistNumber"=T1."BatchNum" and T2."ItemCode"=T1."ItemCode"


Thanks,
Prudhvi.

entry.title: Re: HANA Vector Engine and LangChain
entry.content: Hi Martin, great blog. Can't wait to test it myself. The link to the Vector Enginec Documentation seems to be broken. Can you confirm the link? Kind regards
